{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201646457C44664F751D5F85DF5B"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577963035992441662","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哈喽哈喽，大家好！我是本书的作者，蹦迪图图。在我看来这个小说，并没有所谓的主角，也没有所谓的救世主，本就是以群像故事展开的，每个角色都有不一样的性格和行为方式，连升级打怪的方式也有所不同，每个人的都是不可或缺的，最后才能成功完成所有任务和离开游戏世界。文中并无cp哦，我也爱我笔下的每个角色，希望不太喜欢的家人们，轻喷，最后感恩大家能够喜欢这本书。","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":46,"text":"救世主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739964055F85DF5B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227577963035992441662%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227569825749734018110%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764386875,"group_id":"7569825749734018110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"种一棵树最好的时间是十年前其次是现在。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyO9e/Dmsb4ji7/DJ5aw8aM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea098b5291ae4b989e8085346447bcd3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534672&x-signature=nV79WrRHOaIzROFMs89xEEyRveQ%3D","user_id":"153563561461692","user_name":"蹦迪图图"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"153563561461692","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_na
